title: BanzaEvent
description: Canonical envelope for all events emitted on the BANZA internal event stream (GET /events, GET /events/history). Every state-changing operation emits one or more events in this format.

id.description: Globally unique event identifier. Format: 'evt-<uuid>'. Used for deduplication by consumers. Immutable once emitted.

event_type.description: Dotted-namespace event type identifier. See contracts/events/types.json for the canonical registry.

aggregate_type.description: The entity domain this event belongs to.

aggregate_id.description: The ID of the primary entity this event describes. Matches the ID of the wallet, transfer, payment_request, qr, or settlement that was mutated.

trace_id.description: Causal trace identifier. Shared across all operations in the same payment flow (e.g. QR generation, resulting transfer, resulting ledger entries, and this event all share the same trace_id). INV-TRACE-001: this field MUST match the trace_id of the operation that generated this event.

correlation_id.description: Identifies the current aggregate step within the trace. Changes per operation layer. Typically equals the aggregate_id of the step that emitted the event.

causation_id.description: The ID of the direct cause of this event. Present when an operation is triggered by another (e.g. a transfer caused by a payment_request: causation_id = payment_request.id). Absent for root operations.

payload.description: Event-specific data. Shape is defined per event_type in contracts/events/types.json. All monetary values in payload MUST use integer minor units (INV-LEDGER-003).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this event was emitted by the protocol. UTC. Set by the emitter, not the consumer.
